message:
fix: update call sites for sender_token param, minor fixes

Propagate the new sender_token parameter (always None) to all existing
send_message call sites that don't use sender verification yet:
server ATC advisory/probe effects, TUI message browser, macros
contact_handshake, and resource shape tests.

Also:
- Fix TTL clamping warning in macros to also warn on upper bound
- Fix summarize_thread_product Vec capacity to account for multi-project
  queries (saturating_mul by project count)
- Reformat mail_ui block_on_outcome error tuple for consistency
- Update test fixtures for registration_token: None
- Cargo.lock: beads_rust 0.1.33 → 0.1.34

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4286,6 +4286,7 @@ fn execute_atc_advisory_effect(
                 None,
                 Some(false),
                 Some(false),
+                None,
             )
             .await
         })
@@ -4321,6 +4322,7 @@ fn execute_atc_probe_effect(
                 None,
                 Some(false),
                 Some(true),
+                None,
             )
             .await
         })

@@ -5067,6 +5067,7 @@ mod resource_shape_tests {
                         None,
                         None,
                         None,
+                        None,
                     )
                     .await
                     .expect("send_message"),
